{{Quote|I've been one step ahead of Imperial stormtroopers all day. Let's finish this deal so I can blow this planet.|Krox, to Mungo Baobab|<ref name="Tail of the Roon Comets" />}}
'''Krox''' was a two-headed [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] who gave [[Mungo Baobab]] the map to the [[Roon system/Legends|Roon system]] in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manda/Legends|Manda]]. He left the cantina when two [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] arrived.

==Appearances==
*{{DroidsCite|Tail of the Roon Comets}} {{1st}}
